app.name: WithEase
app.emergency_stop.message: All assistance features have been disabled. Press the emergency key again to resume.
settings.title: WithEase – Settings
settings.store.title: Modules
settings.store.hint: Extend WithEase with additional modules. Every module shown here comes directly from WithEase and is vetted. To install, just click “Install” – after a restart the module is ready to use.
settings.store.offline: The module list could not be loaded (no internet connection?). Please try again later.
settings.store.empty: No modules are available right now.
settings.store.restart_hint: WithEase must be restarted for the changes to take effect.
settings.store.remove.confirm.title: Remove module
settings.store.remove.confirm.text: Really remove “{name}”? The module will be deleted from this PC (you can reinstall it any time).
settings.general.title: General Settings
settings.general.emergency_key.descripti: Immediately stops all assistance features and releases stuck modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Win). If anything behaves unexpectedly, this is your panic button. Pressing the same key again turns everything back on.
settings.general.emergency_key.empty_war: ⚠ No emergency stop key is set. To stop everything instantly, only the tray menu / emergency-stop button remain. It's best to assign a key.
settings.profiles.title: Profiles
settings.profiles.description: Profiles store all module settings separately – e.g. for different people or situations (work, gaming …). Double-click or “Activate” switches the profile.
settings.profiles.delete.confirm: Really delete profile “{name}”? All settings stored in it will be lost.
settings.actions.title: Action Manager
settings.actions.description: Assign triggers (keys, buttons, devices) to actions.
settings.actions.overview_hint: All actions and macros with their hotkeys at a glance. Use the star to mark favourites – they appear in the overlay at the screen edge.
settings.actions.overlay.description: Shows your favourites permanently at the screen edge – your most important hotkeys always in view. The overlay can be dragged freely with the mouse.
settings.actions.order_hint: Favourites are listed first – reorder with ▲▼ (also applies to the overlay).
settings.actions.overlay.hover_hide: Temporarily hide on mouse-over (to reach elements behind it)
hotkey.taken: ⚠ Key not applied – already assigned to: {name}
module.mouse.name: Mouse
module.mouse.centering.description: Moves the cursor to the centre of the screen after a configurable period of inactivity — helpful when locating the cursor is difficult.
module.mouse.show_symbol: Show symbol next to the cursor
module.mouse.precision.description: Slows the cursor to a configurable speed — ideal for small buttons or precise clicking.
module.mouse.click_lock.description: Holds the left mouse button down without having to keep the physical button pressed — useful for dragging and selecting.
module.mouse.highlight.description: Shows pulsing rings around the mouse pointer so you can instantly spot where it is on screen with a key press.
module.mouse.highlight.rings: Show pulsing rings around the cursor
module.mouse.highlight.arrow: Show direction arrow from screen centre
module.mouse.keyboard_clicks.description: Replaces left-, right-, and double-click with freely assignable keyboard keys — for users who cannot easily reach the mouse buttons.
module.mouse.screen_zones.description: Divides the screen into a grid — one key press jumps the cursor to the centre of the chosen area. Ideal for covering large distances on big screens quickly without moving the mouse far.
module.mouse.screen_zones.hint: Assign a key to each cell – cursor jumps to the centre of that area.
module.keyboard.name: Keyboard
module.keyboard.description: Keyboard input assistance and Sticky Keys
module.keyboard.delay.description: Suppresses unintentional repeated keystrokes by enforcing a minimum pause between two identical keys.
module.keyboard.delay.exceptions.hint: e.g. Key.space, Key.enter – these keys bypass the delay
module.keyboard.sticky.description: Modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Win) stay active after a single press and release after the next key — replaces holding multiple keys simultaneously.
module.macros.name: Macros
module.macros.description: Key shortcuts for text snippets, programs and actions
module.macros.dialog.name: Name
module.macros.dialog.key.duplicate: ⚠ This key is already assigned to another macro.
module.macros.dialog.text.placeholder: Enter the text to insert here …
module.macros.dialog.app.browse.title: Select application
module.macros.step.title: Edit step
module.macros.step.mouse.fixed: Click at a fixed screen position
module.macros.step.mouse.capture.hint: After clicking: move the cursor to the target and confirm with Space (Esc cancels).
module.macros.step.window.hint: A part of the title is enough, e.g. “Notepad”. The first matching window is brought to the foreground.
module.macros.col.name: Name
app.update.title: Update WithEase
app.update.heading: New version {version} is available
app.update.installing: Downloading and installing the update … Please wait.
app.update.done: The update is complete. WithEase will now restart.
app.update.failed:
The update did not work: {err}
You can also install the new version from the download page.
app.update.exe_hint: To update, download the new version from the download page, unpack it and replace your WithEase folder. Your settings are kept.
about.share.heading: Share the project
about.share.hint: Share WithEase: this link always points to the newest release, so anyone can download the current version.
feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.intro: Thanks for helping improve WithEase! Briefly describe your request. Version and operating system are included automatically.
feedback.category.question: Question
feedback.message.placeholder: What happened, or what would you like?
feedback.name: Name (optional)
feedback.sent: ✓ Thank you! Your feedback has been sent.
feedback.failed: Sending failed: {err}. Please try again later.
feedback.failed_network: Could not reach the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
feedback.failed_server: The server rejected the message ({err}). Please try again later.
feedback.not_configured: Feedback is not set up yet.
about.description: Modular accessibility assistant for people with motor impairments.
about.vibe: In all honesty: WithEase was built with AI-assisted "vibe coding". That's nothing to be ashamed of – quite the opposite: it's what let me turn my idea into a program people can actually use and share. Passing up that chance would have been the worse choice.
